seo.keywords: Simbu, Vallavan, Blaaze, Simbu, Loose Penne full lyrics, Vallavan songs lyrics, Loose Penne lyrics snippets, Loose Penne WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Loose Penne lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Loose Penne?

The song explores themes of youthful romance and heartbreak, capturing the emotional turmoil of love.

Who are the singers of Loose Penne?

The song is sung by Simbu and Blaaze.

What role does the song play in the movie Vallavan?

In Vallavan, the song highlights the protagonist's emotional journey through love and relationships.

When was Loose Penne released?

The song was released in 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Loose Penne from Vallavan is a lively and energetic song that delves into the complexities of love and heartbreak. Sung by Simbu and Blaaze, the track features catchy beats and expressive lyrics that resonate with the youthful spirit of the movie. The song captures the protagonist's emotional struggles and the intensity of romantic relationships. It evokes a sense of nostalgia and energy, making it a favorite for parties and night drives.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Loose Penne from Vallavan is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of youthful romance and heartbreak. Sung by the dynamic duo of Simbu and Blaaze, this song combines catchy beats with heartfelt lyrics. Dive into the world of Vallavan and experience the unique blend of emotions that only Simbu can deliver.
stanzaMeanings: Girl, you got my heart breaking. Girl, there’s no pretending. Girl, it’s you that I need, oh yes indeed. As time goes by, this isn’t a reason. If you’re feeling my pain, let me explain.
Crazy girl, crazy girl, crazy girl, a crazy boy is going crazy over you.
Won’t love come? Won’t love come? Will you never love me again?
From morning till evening, every day, I live thinking only of you.
When I close my eyes and sleep at night, even the fan in my room comes down to wake me up, telling me to think of you.
Crazy girl, crazy girl, crazy girl, a crazy boy is going crazy over you.

Crazy girl, crazy girl, you got me going but I don’t know where I’m going. Since you got me thinking that I’m losing my mind, you simply got me feeling like I’m in another time. Because I never received your call, that was just like you. Now I’d never ever want to be your tool. Now I’d never ever want you to say no, crazy girl, you know, you know, so please don’t tell.
Loneliness is searching, the heart is running. I keep searching for myself, searching and searching.
I thought of giving myself to you, I sent my heart with great desire.
I don’t know how to write songs like Vaali. I can’t help but sing about you.
I kept scolding myself, but my heart didn’t change. My heart didn’t leave you.
Crazy girl, crazy girl, crazy boy is going crazy. Crazy, crazy girl, crazy girl, crazy, crazy girl, crazy boy is going crazy over you.
Won’t love come? Won’t love come? Will you never love me again?
From morning till evening, every day, I live thinking only of you. When I close my eyes and sleep at night, even the fan in my room comes down to wake me up, telling me to think of you.
Crazy girl, crazy girl, crazy girl, a crazy boy is going crazy over you.
You may not know right now the pain I feel, it is so real. And no matter where the future lies, I see right now only you and I, only you and I, only you and I, yeah.
